name: I'm on a Drawbridge
hints: You are on the drawbridge between the field and the castle entryway. The moat is below.
LOOK UP or LOOK BATTLEMENTS to see what is on the castle walls above. There is a tin can up there.
GO MOAT to jump into the moat water (leads to room 16). EAST enters the castle entryway, WEST returns to the field.

effects: Message: a tin can up there.

notes: The drawbridge over the moat. LOOK BATTLEMENTS reveals a tin can on the castle walls. GO MOAT jumps into the moat water (room 16). East enters the castle entryway (room 28), west returns to the field (room 1).
